meta.name: Richard PERRET
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.tagline: I build software that solves real problems. When I'm not coding, I'm probably running or training for my next challenge.

projects.title: P9P
projects.description: Internal conversational AI agent I designed and built solo. Ask questions about clients, CRM data and history in natural language. Execute actions via tools connected to internal APIs, schedule automated jobs (reports, batch processing). Configurable roles/scenarios, RAG over business docs, multilingual interface (FR/EN/ES).

projects.title: Project Arya
projects.description: Personal side project, still in active development. A cross-platform mobile app for sports coaching and performance tracking across any discipline. Set goals, follow tailored workouts, track metrics and watch progression over time. Built from scratch on my own time.

projects.title: Portail & Reference
projects.description: The backbone of the company's information system, built over three years with an amazing team. Portail is the web app where teams manage projects, contracts, billing, HR and support, with each role seeing exactly what it needs. Reference is the REST API behind it all, serving every internal tool. Great coworkers, strong code reviews, and a shared obsession for performance and quality.
